# Chicago Nigerians

> Connecting Nigerians in Chicago — Socially & Professionally. The fastest-growing Nigerian community platform in Chicago for networking, events, marketplace, and cultural updates.

## About

Chicago Nigerians is a community-driven platform that brings together Nigerians living in the Chicago metropolitan area. The platform enables members to network professionally and socially, discover and attend community events, support Nigerian-owned local businesses through a marketplace, and stay updated with news from Nigeria and the diaspora.

- 500+ active members
- 50+ monthly events
- 50+ local businesses listed
- Free to join with optional premium membership ($20/month)

## Core Features

- **Networking Feed**: A social networking feed for connecting with fellow Nigerians professionally and socially
- **Events & Ticketing**: Discover, host, and attend Nigerian cultural events, business meetups, and community gatherings
- **Marketplace**: Buy and sell products and services within the Nigerian community; a directory of local Nigerian-owned businesses
- **News & Culture Updates**: Stay updated with the latest news from Nigeria and cultural happenings in Chicago

## Links

- [Home](https://chicagonigerians.com/): Landing page with community overview
- [Community Feed](https://chicagonigerians.com/feeds): Social networking and news feed
- [Events](https://chicagonigerians.com/events): Browse and register for community events
- [Marketplace](https://chicagonigerians.com/marketplace): Nigerian business directory and marketplace
- [About Us](https://chicagonigerians.com/about): Learn more about the community
- [Contact Us](https://chicagonigerians.com/contacts): Get in touch with the team
- [Privacy Policy](https://chicagonigerians.com/privacy-policy): Privacy policy
- [Terms of Service](https://chicagonigerians.com/terms-of-service): Terms of service
